StmtSimple.StatementText: WITH AllRoles AS ( SELECT Id, ParentRoleId As PId, 1 AS Depth FROM Role WHERE Id = @roleId UNION ALL SELECT parent.Id AS Id, parent.ParentRoleId AS PId, child.Depth + 1 AS Depth FROM [Role] parent INNER JOIN AllRoles child ON parent.Id = child.PId ), Props AS ( SELECT p.PropertyId, p.Value, r.Depth AS RoleDepth, p.RoleId, p.PrincipalId FROM [UserRoleProperty] p INNER JOIN AllRoles r ON p.RoleId = r.Id WHERE p.PrincipalId = @principalId AND p.DeletedTime IS NULL UNION SELECT p.PropertyId, p.Value, 10000 * r.Depth AS RoleDepth, p.RoleId, NULL AS PrincipalId FROM RoleProperty p INNER JOIN AllRoles r ON p.RoleId = r.Id WHERE p.DeletedTime IS NULL ) SELECT p.PropertyId , p.RoleDepth, p2.Value, p3.Name, p3.AggregatedPropertyId AS AggregatedName, p2.RoleId, p2.PrincipalId FROM (SELECT PropertyId, MIN(RoleDepth) AS RoleDepth FROM Props GROUP BY PropertyId) p INNER JOIN Props p2 ON p.PropertyId = p2.PropertyId AND p.RoleDepth = p2.RoleDepth INNER JOIN [Property] p3 ON p.PropertyId = p3.Id ORDER BY PropertyId

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [Expr1066]>(100) THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN [Expr1070]>(100) THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN [Expr1074]>(100) THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN [Expr1078]>(100) THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
